data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (validated in sandbox, 2026-06-09): guard must go AFTER _strip_output_flags / set -- so `rebar reopen --output json` (flags only, no id) is also caught. Validated diff in the reopen arm (src/rebar/_engine/rebar, after set -- line ~290):
   if [ $# -lt 1 ]; then
       _print_subcommand_help reopen >&2
       exit 1
   fi
Validated: no-arg reopen prints the Usage line to stderr, exit 1, zero bash diagnostics; create->close->reopen <id> still works. NOTE: grep shows NO existing test mentions reopen — the RED test is net-new coverage (suggested home: a reopen section in a new or existing dispatcher test).
